bug_report.summary: Ctrl+F opens Find UI but unexpectedly selects text and pre-fills the query
steps_to_reproduce: Open a Markdown document in the editor.
Place the caret inside text (do not select text).
Press Ctrl+F to open the Find UI.
Observe the Find input field and the document selection state.
expected_behaviors: Ctrl+F should open the Find UI without changing the current caret/selection state.
The Find input should not be automatically populated unless there is an intentional selection-based feature (and even then should match consistent pre-change behavior).
actual_behaviors: After the code change, pressing Ctrl+F results in an automatic selection being present (status shows “5 selected …”) and the Find field is pre-filled with the selected text (“and then some trailing text.”), whereas before the change the Find field opened empty and without introducing a new selection.
